name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Fern Park Value Pawn & Jewelry at 7000 S US Hwy 17-92 provides quick cash for gold, jewelry, electronics, and collectibles.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry is located at 7000 S US Hwy 17-92 in Fern Park, FL, serving the central Florida community with convenient pawn and sales services. The shop operates Monday through Friday 10 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 10 AM to 6 PM, and Sunday noon to 5 PM. The standalone location is easily accessible along the highway corridor.

The Fern Park location offers complete pawn services for jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools, and other valuables. You can also buy quality pre-owned items or sell gold and silver directly to the shop. For appraisals or questions about any item, call 407-339-8801 to speak with the experienced team.

If you're in Fern Park and need immediate cash, this Value Pawn & Jewelry location offers a straightforward alternative to traditional loans. Bring a valid photo ID and your item for an on-the-spot estimate. The business has served Florida customers looking for both quick cash and quality deals on pre-owned merchandise.
address: 7000 S US Hwy 17 92, Fern Park, FL 32730

company_info.headquarters: 7000 S US Hwy 17 92, Fern Park, FL 32730

pros: Instant Quote online tool for electronics allows customers to get estimated values without visiting the store
Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays, open Sundays 12pm-5pm) provide convenient access compared to typical retail
Layaway option with only 10% down payment and flexible monthly installments locks in low prices
Expert gold and diamond buyers who test precious metals to ensure fair pricing
Large online inventory with daily new arrivals and 25-70% discounts on brand-name pre-owned merchandise
EZ+ Rewards Program provides points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions
Third-party financing options (Take Today) available for eligible customers to pay over 12+ months
Specialized services including jewelry protection plans with guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up values
cons: All merchandise is pre-owned only; no new items available despite discounted pricing claims
Pawn loans subject to undisclosed fees and terms requiring in-store consultation with staff
Third-party financing through Take Today requires credit eligibility check and approval, not guaranteed
Online payments not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania, limiting convenience for some customers
Pawn transactions are short-term loans requiring repayment with interest/fees; not suitable for long-term borrowing needs
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash who have valuable items to use as collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools)
Bargain hunters seeking heavily discounted pre-owned electronics, jewelry, and brand-name merchandise
Individuals looking to sell gold, diamonds, or other precious metals quickly for cash
Budget-conscious shoppers unable to afford new retail prices who accept pre-owned condition
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for individuals with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools) who need immediate cash and can repay short-term pawn loans, or for bargain shoppers seeking heavily discounted pre-owned merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn lending is not a credit-building solution—it's a short-term collateral-based loan with fees, and failure to repay results in loss of the pledged item; this is unsuitable for those seeking financial stability or credit improvement.
services: Pawn loans on items in working condition with instant cash upon approval
Gold and diamond buying with precious metal testing for fair market pricing
Retail merchandise sales (electronics, tools, gaming, jewelry, handbags, sneakers) at 25-70% discount
Instant Quote online valuation tool for electronics
Layaway purchases with 10% down payment and monthly installments
Take Today third-party financing (up to 12 months, subject to credit approval)
Online inventory shopping with daily new arrivals
EZ+ Rewards Program with points accumulation on eligible transactions
Online payment processing for pawn extensions and layaways (except AZ, OR, PA)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise coverage
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
